headline: Stifel Cuts PT on Oracle Corporation (ORCL)
summary: Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) is one of the most profitable blue chip stocks to invest in now. Stifel cut the price target on Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) to $220 from $275 on March 11, maintaining a Buy rating on the share. The firm told investors in a post-earnings note that while it expects capex growth in FY27 […]
